plan.content:
The to-do list for the reporting phase has been successfully created. Here’s a summary of the plan:

### Reporting Phase Summary
1. Define the report structure and format.
2. Gather all findings and organize them by themes.
3. Draft the Introduction section.
4. Draft the Methodology section.
5. Draft the Findings section, including visuals.
6. Draft the Discussion section.
7. Draft the Conclusion section.
8. Draft the References section.
9. Review the draft for clarity and coherence.
10. Revise sections based on the review.
11. Finalize the report formatting.
12. Create an Executive Summary.
13. Prepare a presentation based on the report.

This structured approach will ensure a comprehensive and well-documented report that effectively communicates the research findings.
